thread_tweets.text:
You’re 100% right that I believed in LUNA five years ago and shilled it on the way up.

I also talked about the risks involved in early 2022 when I talked about how the leverage that worked well for it in a bull market would work against it in a bear market.

And I learned from that.

e.g. I thought a 90%+ haircut was possible when it was the hottest coin on the market - I never assumed it’d go to zero.

I learned that it’s important to take the time to challenge yourself and what the crowd says is a system that works and has zero chance of completely failing.

And I learned that I would way rather be an outspoken vocal advocate toward helping prevent that type of situation from happening again than I would be someone that doesn’t want to deal with the criticism of the crowd and sit on the sidelines and say nothing.

tweets.text: If you made your money as a degenerate you HAVE to actually cash it out to a bank account or you will continue to gamble like a degenerate and lose it all lol
tweets.quoted_tweet_text: During the 2022 crash, I put my entire savings into BTC. My average entry was around $25k per BTC, with a total of 10 BTC. I held through the run up to $100k and sold everything. Out of the roughly $1 million I ended up with, I’ve now gambled away about 90%, leaving me $100k.
tweets.full_text: If you made your money as a degenerate you HAVE to actually cash it out to a bank account or you will continue to gamble like a degenerate and lose it all lol

tweets.text: Combining real estate with Bitcoin solves nothing. @GrantCardone claims REITs need Bitcoin on their balance sheets to sell so they can pay for repairs and maintenance. But real estate throws off rental income, which can be used to cover those ongoing costs. Happy to debate this.

thread_tweets.text: Combining real estate with Bitcoin solves nothing. @GrantCardone claims REITs need Bitcoin on their balance sheets to sell so they can pay for repairs and maintenance. But real estate throws off rental income, which can be used to cover those ongoing costs. Happy to debate this.
thread_tweets.full_text: Combining real estate with Bitcoin solves nothing. @GrantCardone claims REITs need Bitcoin on their balance sheets to sell so they can pay for repairs and maintenance. But real estate throws off rental income, which can be used to cover those ongoing costs. Happy to debate this.

tweets.text: U.S. Senator @SenAdamSchiff thinks people get rich not by working hard or adding value, but because of a flawed tax system that doesn't prevent it from happening. In his mind, wealth comes from government and consumer spending, not savings and capital investment. What an idiot!
tweets.full_text: U.S. Senator @SenAdamSchiff thinks people get rich not by working hard or adding value, but because of a flawed tax system that doesn't prevent it from happening. In his mind, wealth comes from government and consumer spending, not savings and capital investment. What an idiot!

tweets.text: U.S. Senator @SenAdamSchiff is a communist. He thinks confiscating investment capital from the rich to fund government spending and consumption will raise the living standards of average Americans. This false promise has impoverished nations everywhere it’s been implemented.
